element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic flight controls and aircraft handling
Visual navigation using city skylines, water bodies, terrain features
Takeoff and landing procedures at designated airfields
Flying across Chicago, Los Angeles, New York City, and Seattle regions

element_introduction_order.element: Weather and time of day systems
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Managing flight under different atmospheric and visibility conditions
Flying Sopwith Camel, declaring war, engaging enemy aircraft in grid-divided area with mountains

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Open-ended, player-driven pacing with optional difficulty escalation from peaceful flight simulation to combat scenarios

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secondary aircraft types and alternative regions available for exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Grid-divided area structure in Europe 1917 combat mode creates bounded play zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with stable Cessna 182 in familiar geography (Chicago with visible landmarks like Lake Michigan and city skyline)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Exploration of three additional US regions with varying terrain; introduction to variable weather and time of day systems
difficulty_curve.late_game: Optional escalation to combat mode with enemy engagement in mountainous terrain; increased navigation complexity in grid-divided European landscape
notable_spikes: Transition to combat mode (Europe 1917) with enemy aircraft

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct US regional flight areas (Chicago, Los Angeles, New York City, Seattle) that serve as distinct play contexts with unique geography and landmarks
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Chicago starting location (Meigs Field with Lake Michigan and city skyline)

notable_level_patterns.description: Open flight space where player navigation is facilitated through environmental landmarks (skylines, water bodies, terrain) rather than linear progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Chicago region with Lake Michigan navigation reference

notable_level_patterns.description: Grid-divided bounded area with mountains on two sides creating constrained combat space; distinct from free-flight exploration

sources_used: Wikipedia - Microsoft Flight Simulator (1982 video game)
